---
title: "create_infographic"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

sleep <- read.csv("sleep_health_dataset.csv")

sleep_palette <- c(
  "midnight" = "#1B263B",
  "deep_blue" = "#415A77",
  "soft_blue" = "#778DA9",
  "moonlight" = "#E0E1DD",
  "lavender" = "#CDB4DB",
  "dream_pink" = "#FFC8DD",
  "sunrise_coral" = "#FFAF87"
)

sleep <- sleep %>%
  mutate(
    exercise_day = factor(exercise_day, labels = c("No Exercise", "Exercise")),
    felt_rested = factor(felt_rested, labels = c("Did Not Feel Rested", "Felt Rested")),
    sleep_aid_used = factor(sleep_aid_used, labels = c("No Sleep Aid", "Used Sleep Aid")),
    shift_work = factor(shift_work, labels = c("No Shift Work", "Shift Work"))
  )

# Summary statistics
avg_sleep <- round(mean(sleep$sleep_duration_hrs, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
avg_quality <- round(mean(sleep$sleep_quality_score, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
rested_pct <- round(mean(sleep$felt_rested == "Felt Rested", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)

# A reusable minimal theme
theme_sleep <- function() {
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, color = sleep_palette["midnight"]),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]),
      axis.title = element_text(color = sleep_palette["midnight"], face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90")
    )
}

# Title block
title_plot <- ggplot() +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.72,
           label = "The Architecture of Sleep",
           size = 10, fontface = "bold", color = sleep_palette["midnight"]) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.45,
           label = "How Daily Habits Shape Rest and Performance",
           size = 5, color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.18,
           label = "A visual exhibit exploring sleep duration, work habits, caffeine use, and health risk.",
           size = 4, color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]) +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void()

# Stat cards
stat1 <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1, fill = sleep_palette["moonlight"], color = NA) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.65, label = avg_sleep, size = 10, fontface = "bold", color = sleep_palette["midnight"]) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.32, label = "Average Sleep Hours", size = 4.5, color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]) +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void()

stat2 <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1, fill = sleep_palette["lavender"], color = NA) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.65, label = avg_quality, size = 10, fontface = "bold", color = sleep_palette["midnight"]) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.32, label = "Average Sleep Quality", size = 4.5, color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]) +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void()

stat3 <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1, fill = sleep_palette["dream_pink"], color = NA) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.65, label = paste0(rested_pct, "%"), size = 10, fontface = "bold", color = sleep_palette["midnight"]) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.32, label = "Felt Rested", size = 4.5, color = sleep_palette["deep_blue"]) +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void()

# Teaser visualization 1
p1 <- ggplot(sleep, aes(x = sleep_duration_hrs, y = sleep_quality_score)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.08, color = sleep_palette["soft_blue"]) +
  geom_smooth(color = sleep_palette["sunrise_coral"], se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Sleep Duration and Sleep Quality",
    x = "Sleep Duration (hours)",
    y = "Sleep Quality Score"
  ) +
  theme_sleep()

# Teaser visualization 2
p2 <- ggplot(sleep, aes(x = work_hours_that_day, y = sleep_duration_hrs)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.08, color = sleep_palette["lavender"]) +
  geom_smooth(color = sleep_palette["midnight"], se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Work Hours and Sleep Duration",
    x = "Work Hours",
    y = "Sleep Duration (hours)"
  ) +
  theme_sleep()

# Teaser visualization 3
p3 <- ggplot(sleep, aes(x = sleep_disorder_risk, y = sleep_quality_score, fill = sleep_disorder_risk)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.9, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Healthy" = sleep_palette["soft_blue"],
    "Low" = sleep_palette["moonlight"],
    "Moderate" = sleep_palette["lavender"],
    "High" = sleep_palette["sunrise_coral"]
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Sleep Disorder Risk and Sleep Quality",
    x = "Sleep Disorder Risk",
    y = "Sleep Quality Score"
  ) +
  theme_sleep()

# Footer / call to action
footer_plot <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1, fill = sleep_palette["midnight"], color = NA) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.62,
           label = "Explore the full exhibit to see how daily habits shape sleep, health, and performance.",
           size = 4.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.28,
           label = "MATH 230 Data Visualization Exhibit",
           size = 4, color = sleep_palette["moonlight"]) +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void()

# Combine into infographic
infographic <- title_plot /
  (stat1 | stat2 | stat3) /
  (p1 | p2 | p3) /
  footer_plot +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.1, 0.9, 2.3, 0.8))

infographic

# Save as image
ggsave("sleep_infographic.png", infographic, width = 14, height = 16, dpi = 300)
```
